# What changed

One sentence describing the change.

## Why

The problem you're solving, the user request, or the bug being fixed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Breaking change (changes a pipeline output key, scoring weight,
      or other API contract)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Validation

- [ ] `python smoke_test.py` passes
- [ ] `python run_tests.py` is 71/71 (or higher if I added tests)
- [ ] `python bug_test.py` is 31/31 PASS
- [ ] I added regression tests for any bug I fixed
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` if this is user-visible

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs context, design decisions worth discussing, or
parts you're uncertain about.
